allow:
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin psql -h localhost -p 54320 -U admin -d tradingdb -c "
-- Check for duplicate \(symbol, date\) pairs in ohlcv_factors
SELECT symbol, date, COUNT\(*\) AS cnt
FROM stock_ai.ohlcv_factors
GROUP BY symbol, date
HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
ORDER BY symbol, date;

-- Check for duplicate \(symbol, date\) pairs in signals
SELECT symbol, date, COUNT\(*\) AS cnt
FROM stock_ai.signals
GROUP BY symbol, date
HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
ORDER BY symbol, date;
" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin psql -h localhost -p 54320 -U admin -d tradingdb -c "
-- Create new tables
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stock_ai.watchlist \(
    symbol     VARCHAR\(20\) NOT NULL,
    group_name VARCHAR\(50\) NOT NULL,
    added_at   DATE        NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,
    PRIMARY KEY \(symbol, group_name\)
\);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stock_ai.symbol_groups \(
    run_date   DATE        NOT NULL,
    group_name VARCHAR\(50\) NOT NULL,
    symbol     VARCHAR\(20\) NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY \(run_date, group_name, symbol\)
\);

-- Seed your existing 9 symbols as 'potential'
INSERT INTO stock_ai.watchlist \(symbol, group_name\) VALUES
  \('AAPL', 'potential'\), \('MSFT', 'potential'\), \('GOOG', 'potential'\),
  \('TSLA', 'potential'\), \('AMZN', 'potential'\), \('BILI', 'potential'\),
  \('SOUN', 'potential'\), \('CRSP', 'potential'\), \('TSM',  'potential'\)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

SELECT group_name, COUNT\(*\) FROM stock_ai.watchlist GROUP BY group_name;
" 2>&1)
